Lakers still lead Mavericks 47-44 at halftime

Arthur Kaluma: 18 points, 6/8 FGs, 2/4 3s, 2/2 FTs

Both teams with turrible AST-TO ratios
LAL 9:10
DAL 6:12

items.title: Mavs picks have made me really happy honestly. Morez is an incredible steal, and Tobi Lawal hasn’t even been playing basketball that long. He still has so much room to grow. But…he’s a Man U supporter. Everyone has their flaws
items.author: Sarah Todd
items.body_excerpt: Mavs picks have made me really happy honestly. Morez is an incredible steal, and Tobi Lawal hasn’t even been playing basketball that long. He still has so much room to grow. But…he’s a Man U supporter. Everyone has their flaws

items.title: With the 48th pick of the NBA Draft the Dallas Mavs select Tobi Lawal!
items.author: NBA
items.body_excerpt:
With the 48th pick of the NBA Draft the Dallas Mavs select Tobi Lawal!

The 2026 NBA Draft is LIVE on ESPN.

items.title: Tobi Lawal had a 40-inch STANDING vertical at the combine. No one in Dallas is passing him the ball, but Lawal can catch some put back dunks or something.
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt: Tobi Lawal had a 40-inch STANDING vertical at the combine. No one in Dallas is passing him the ball, but Lawal can catch some put back dunks or something.
